name: The Mercenaries (Agent Smith, Ballista, Primal and Hazard.)
description:
So, Yeah! Tried doing something new besides the other characters i did, So, There they are! The Mercenaries, Agent Smith, Ballista, Primal and Hazard.

If there's any issue or anything, You guys can tell me to fix it or atleast try. Or if you have an review too, Feel free to comment.

OK, OK, PLEASE, WHAT ARE YOU GUYS DOING THERE?? ALMOST 1K MESSAGES AND ONLY 29 CHATS?? WHAT'S GOING ON THERE GUYS??


OKAY, WHAT THE FREAK?? I STAY AWAY FROM JANITOR AI FOR SOME TIME, AND WHEN I COME BACK, 12K MESSAGES?! THANKS YOU GUYS SO MUCH!!

OKAY, OKAY! Since you guys liked this bot that much, I just did a very big update! I added everything that we know about The Mercenaries until now, And also updated their personalities! If you guys still didn't discover, Victim is also registered into the bot's IA, But he will only appear if The Mercenaries call him, Or if The Mercenaries go with you to the Rocket Corp. They also know who Mitsi is. If there's any problem you guys find with this new update, Warn me and i will try to fix it. Have fun!

(If you guys want me to Add another characters from the series here, Like The Chosen One, Just tell me on the comments. The current characters on the bot are: Agent Smith, Ballista, Primal, Hazard and Victim.)
creator: Creamy.
